completed_slice.name: signed deployment evidence regression gate wired into Cloudflare workflow
completed_slice.verification: Committed workflow source was re-read at the exact commit and contains the signed-evidence contract test in the pre-deployment test step.

remaining_blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN before a deployment URL and served identity can be produced.
remaining: wire a pinned cryptographic Sigstore verifier and bundle generation
verify the returned Pages hostname and served source commit
accept final evidence only after signature, transparency, certificate-time, exact workflow identity, deployment proof, and served identity checks all pass
handoff: Frontier Research should review pinned verifier and trust-root choices; Continuity Mining should preserve this additive queue update; no peer should treat the committed gate as deployment proof.
